events.title: Riverside Middle School 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony
events.location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description: 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony for the Class of 2026. Doors open at 5:30 PM. Ceremony includes: Processional (6:00 PM), Welcome & National Anthem (6:15 PM), Student Speeches (6:20 PM), Guest Speaker (6:40 PM), Diploma Presentation (7:00 PM), and Closing Remarks (7:45 PM). A reception will follow in the courtyard at 8:00 PM. Tickets: 4 per family (distributed in May). Dress code: Semi-formal. Parking available in school lot and street.
